title: Reis smile
wikitext:
[]: Rei's smile             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Thu Jul 05, 2012 1:55 pm I'm just wondering something... was Rei's smile at the end of episode 6 after the Ramiel battle changed in some versions? If so, which versions? I ask this because, in my Platinum Complete boxset it seems her smile is the original version and it kinda looks goofy, whilst I see a different smile that she makes in some other images on the internet (I don't mean Rebuild's).

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 05, 2012 1:57 pm That scene was reanimated in Death, but was never retrofitted to the published episode.

[]:             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Thu Jul 05, 2012 2:17 pm Mr. Tines wrote: That scene was reanimated in Death, but was never retrofitted to the published episode.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Thu Jul 05, 2012 11:48 pm Mr. Tines wrote: That scene was reanimated in Death, but was never retrofitted to the published episode.
